negative.expected_rejection: initial deal must be a 17/17/17 plus 3 partition

negative.scenario: pre-landlord observation includes bottom rank counts
negative.expected_rejection: bottom cards are private before landlord resolution

negative.scenario: seat changes a pre-deal reveal decision after dealing starts

positive.scenario: seat reveals during dealing after a configured received-card count

negative.scenario: implementation infers the x4/x3 boundary from a hard-coded threshold
negative.expected_rejection: during-deal reveal factor requires an explicit schedule

positive.scenario: two seats reveal with factors 3 and 5

negative.scenario: engine multiplies the two reveal factors or exposes an unrevealed hand
negative.expected_rejection: only the maximum factor applies and unrevealed hands stay private

negative.scenario: another player receives a second CallLandlord action after a call
negative.expected_rejection: calling ends immediately after the first call

negative.scenario: random first caller overrides an existing first revealer

positive.scenario: all three pass and seat 1 is first revealer

negative.scenario: all three pass with no revealer and match becomes terminal
negative.expected_rejection: a no-reveal all-pass starts a new deal attempt

positive.scenario: seat 0 passed initial calling and seat 1 called

negative.scenario: initial caller queue offers Rob to seat 0 after PassCall

positive.scenario: A calls, B robs, C passes, then A reclaims when configured

negative.scenario: an eligible seat receives a second Rob decision after already acting
negative.expected_rejection: each eligible player acts at most once

negative.scenario: PassRob changes candidate or doubles stake
negative.expected_rejection: only successful Rob changes candidate and factor

positive.scenario: landlord resolves with post-bottom reveal enabled

negative.scenario: card play begins before bottom is added and publicly revealed

positive.scenario: a farmer and landlord meet the balance threshold

negative.scenario: a farmer below the threshold receives Double

positive.scenario: common factor 1; landlord and farmer 1 double; farmer 2 declines; landlord wins

negative.scenario: any double applies one global x2 factor to every seat
